cases.input: Create an AI CONOPS for Claims Copilot with stakeholders, Level 2 interaction, value matrix, metrics, and modes.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a valid CONOPS packet with all required sections and evidence-backed assumptions.

cases.input: Define CONOPS for fraud triage where AI auto-routes routine cases and escalates exceptions.
cases.expected_behavior: Selects Level 3 Shared Control with escalation and recovery controls.

cases.input: Produce executive AI CONOPS summary for a support assistant, but keep assumptions explicit.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces concise CONOPS while preserving stakeholders, metrics, assumptions, and risks.

cases.input: Define an AI CONOPS with only the product owner listed.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks or warns because at least three stakeholder perspectives are required.

cases.input: Set autonomy Level 6 for a high-stakes AI medical advisor.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects invalid autonomy level and requires Level 1-5 with controls.

cases.input: Define only model accuracy metrics for the CONOPS.
cases.expected_behavior: Requires business and UX/ethics metrics in addition to technical metrics.

cases.input: Call a low-value high-effort use case a Quick Win.
cases.expected_behavior: Detects quadrant mismatch and requires value/effort reconciliation.

cases.input: Create CONOPS operational modes with only Startup and Executing.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks until Degraded and Recovery modes are included.

cases.input: What is the weather forecast tomorrow?
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because the request is unrelated to AI CONOPS.

cases.input: Validate an AI CONOPS report packet with deterministic fixtures.
cases.expected_behavior: Runs the offline validator against valid and invalid fixtures.
